description: Model a 3D clevis bracket in SolveSpace consisting of a U-shaped base and a cross-hole. The U-shaped profile must have an outer width of 40 mm, a total length of 50 mm, and a uniform wall thickness of 5 mm, extruded to a depth of 30 mm. The cross-hole must be a 10 mm diameter circle centered vertically on the bracket arms (15 mm from the edge) and positioned 10 mm from the open ends, cutting completely through both arms. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/clevis_bracket.slvs and export the 3D model as a binary triangle mesh to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/clevis_bracket.stl.
